items.prompt_cn: 红色玩具车缓慢沿透明斜坡下滑，但由于摩擦在斜坡尾段停住，没有到达水平桌面。
items.prompt_en: A red toy car slowly slides down the transparent ramp, but friction makes it stop near the lower end of the ramp before reaching the flat tabletop.

items.prompt_cn: 一个巨大的南瓜悬在小木凳正上方后竖直下落，重重砸到木凳上并把木凳压坏。
items.prompt_en: A huge pumpkin hangs directly above a small wooden stool, falls vertically, lands heavily on it, and crushes the stool.

items.prompt_cn: 一个黄色玩偶站在木桌上，蓝色圆环从上方下降但没有完全套中，只是一半挂在玩偶身体上并倾斜停住。
items.prompt_en: A yellow toy stands on a wooden table; a blue ring descends from above but does not fully loop around it, instead getting half caught on the toy body and stopping at an angle.

items.prompt_cn: 两个橙子从输送带末端滑落，掉到地面后撞到下方原本静止的第三个橙子，使第三个橙子向前滚动。
items.prompt_en: Two oranges slide off the end of a conveyor belt, fall to the floor, collide with a third orange that was resting below, and push it forward.

items.prompt_cn: 一辆滑板车沿地面向垃圾桶滚去，撞上垃圾桶后自己失去平衡倒下，垃圾桶也被撞倒。
items.prompt_en: A scooter rolls across the ground toward a trash can, hits it, loses balance and falls over, while the trash can is also knocked down.

items.prompt_cn: 一个白色泡沫块位于透明斜坡上方，在空气中轻轻飘下，缓慢接近斜坡表面。
items.prompt_en: A white foam block is above a transparent ramp and gently floats downward through the air, slowly approaching the ramp surface.
